MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha/Gina Gonzales, CSR: Sonia Wong.
Michael S. Mooney, Esq. for Plaintiff: The Sheraton LLC.
Witness: Marc T. Whitner, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court takes the matter under submission.
Proposed judgment under review.

12-18-2006
After reviewing the evidence, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant(s): Lubbock Hospitality Investments, LLC, a limited liability company, fdba Four Points Hotel Lubbock aka Four Points Sheraton, now dba Clarion Hotel and Suites; Suresh R. Patel; Vikas C. Patel as follows:
Damages/Principal $115,466.97
Prejudgment Interest $18,334.68
Attorney's Fees $10,000.00
Costs $485.00, for a total of $ 144,286.65
Judgment signed by Comm. Kaplan
